Journal Article · Small, 2206423

Dendritic Plasmonic CuPt Alloys for Closed-Loop Multimode Cancer Therapy with Remarkably Enhanced Efficacy

Mengyu Chang, Man Wang, Yuhui Liu, Min Liu, Abdulaziz A. Al Kheraif, Ping'an Ma*, Yanli Zhao*, and Jun Lin*

DOI Paper Code Slides

Abstract

Dendritic plasmonic CuPt alloys for closed-loop multimode cancer therapy.

Highlights

  • Uses plasmonic CuPt alloy nanostructures for multimode therapy.
  • Emphasizes closed-loop therapeutic design.

Add expanded notes about imaging feedback and therapeutic closure here.

Citation

Mengyu Chang et al. Dendritic Plasmonic CuPt Alloys for Closed-Loop Multimode Cancer Therapy with Remarkably Enhanced Efficacy. Small 2022, 2206423.
